/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/justtype.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/justtype.dir/src/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/justtype.dir/src/editor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/justtype.dir/src/sidebar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/justtype.dir/src/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/justtype.dir/src/search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/justtype.dir/src/icons.cpp.o CMakeFiles/justtype.dir/src/shortcuts.cpp.o -o justtype   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib
